calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-22-2016 Off Calendar

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued To Aug-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: 9;59 am
Appearances:
Paul Arshawsky, Esq. for the Plaintiff Jon Berkley Management.
No other Appearance.

The Court takes the bench. The matter is sent back by Dept. 514. Plaintiff's expert witness did not show up due to a medical emergency. Plaintiff requests a continuance. The Court finds good cause and grants the request. The matter is continued to 8/22/16 at 9:00 am in Dept. 501. Plaintiff to give notice to the other side. Plaintiff to bring medical evidence. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Continued To Aug-15-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Aug-15-2016 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-10-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: JPT: Andrew Westley; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Jon Berkley Management, Inc. is present. Represented by Josh Berkely.
Attorney Paul Arshawsky for the plaintiff.
Defendant Mary Lutz IS NOT PRESENT.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar; no appearance by defendant. The trial date of AUG-10-2016 remains on calendar. (501)
